args:
Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Routing Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/router/trie-router/node.ts' bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts' bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Routing Read/Write Ledger

## src/hono.ts

- Purpose: Main Hono class entrypoint combining HonoBase with default router configuration
- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, HonoOptions
- Simple note: Default constructor uses SmartRouter wrapping RegExpRouter and TrieRouter

## src/hono-base.ts

- Purpose: Core Hono framework base class handling request routing, middleware composition, and error handling
- Names noticed: HonoBase, Hono, Context, Router, compose, Context, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, H, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandler, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, getPath, mergePath, FetchEventLike
- Simple note: Manages routes array, router instance, and #dispatch for request handling

## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Module export for PatternRouter router implementation
- Names noticed: PatternRouter
- Simple note: Re-exports router class from nested implementation

## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts

- Purpose: PatternRouter uses JavaScript RegExp for each route pattern matching
- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Route, emptyParams, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, match, exec, regex pattern building
- Simple note: Converts paths to regex with named capture groups, iterates all routes on match

## src/router/linear-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Module export for LinearRouter router implementation
- Names noticed: LinearRouter
- Simple note: Re-exports router class from nested implementation

## src/router/linear-router/router.ts

- Purpose: LinearRouter performs linear sequential route matching without prebuilt patterns
- Names noticed: LinearRouter, ROUTES_LOOP, emptyParams, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, splitPathRe, splitByStarRe, hasStar, hasLabel
- Simple note: Loops through all routes, handles wildcards, named params via string matching and indexOf

## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Module export for RegExpRouter with PreparedRegExpRouter for serialization support
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, buildAndExportAllMatchers
- Simple note: Exports main router and preparers for router state serialization

## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts

- Purpose: RegExpRouter builds optimized regex matcher from route patterns on first match
- Names notice: RegExpRouter, Matcher, StaticMap, HandlerData, nullMatcher, buildWildcardRegExp, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, findMiddleware, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, PATH_ERROR, ParamAssocArray
- Simple note: Routes added to internal maps, matcher built lazily via Trie then serialized to single regex

## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts

- Purpose: Defines matcher type and match function for RegExpRouter
- Names noticed: ParamIndexMap, ParamStash, Router, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, emptyParam, match
- Simple note: Returns [RegExp, HandlerData[], StaticMap] tuple for routing

## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts

- Purpose: PreparedRegExpRouter enables router state serialization for deployment
- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, RelocateMap, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, Router, buildAllMatchers, buildInitParams
- Simple note: Takes pre-built matchers and relocateMap constructor params, serializes to JSON-safe string

## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts

- Purpose: TrieNode class for building route tree structure in RegExpRouter
- Names noticed: Node, Context, ParamAssocArray, PATH_ERROR, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR, ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_EXP_STR, insert, buildRegExpStr, compareKey
- Simple note: Tree node storing regex patterns and varIndex for labeled parameters, builds final regex string

## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts

- Purpose: Trie class manages insertion and regex generation for route tree
- Names noticed: Trie, Context, ReplacementMap, insert, buildRegExp, Regexp
- Simple note: Walks path tokens, calls Node.insert, builds replacement maps for regex capturing groups

## src/router/smart-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Module export for SmartRouter fallback router implementation
- Names noticed: SmartRouter
- Simple note: Re-exports router class from nested implementation

## src/router/smart-router/router.ts

- Purpose: SmartRouter tries multiple routers sequentially until one succeeds
- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Router, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, activeRouter, routers, routes, match, bind
- Simple note: Iterates router array, adds all routes to each candidate, breaks on first successful match

## src/router/trie-router/index.ts

- Purpose: Module export for TrieRouter router implementation
- Names noticed: TrieRouter
- Simple note: Re-exports router class from nested implementation

## src/router/trie-router/router.ts

- Purpose: TrieRouter uses recursive trie tree traversal for route matching
- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Node, checkOptionalParameter, insert, search, Node
- Simple note: Single trie tree with method/handler per node, searches via path token traversal

## src/router/trie-router/node.ts

- Purpose: Trie node class for TrieRouter implementing path tree traversal
- Names noticed: Node, Params, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Pattern, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, emptyParams, hasChildren, insert, search, possibleKeys, score
- Simple note: Children keyed by literal string or pattern, multiple methods per node, queue-based search

## src/router/common.case.test.ts

- Purpose: Shared test suite for all router implementations
- Names noticed: runTest, RunnerTestSuite, skip, newRouter, Router, Params, ParamIndexMap, match, beforeEach, task, expect
- Simple note: Define common test cases and parameter extraction for all router tests

## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: PatternRouter specific tests with supported and skipped cases
- Names noticed: PatternRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, skip, describe, it, toThrowError, beforeEach, toBe
- Simple note: PatternRouter skips duplicate param and trailing slash tests due to regex constraints

## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: LinearRouter specific tests with unsupported feature skips
- Names noticed: LinearRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, describe, expect, toThrowError, beforeEach
- Simple note: Skips multi-match params, complex regexp, trailing slash due to linear scanning limits

## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: RegExpRouter tests covering ambiguous route rejection cases
- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, ParamStash, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, Router, describe, it, expect, toThrowError, beforeEach
- Simple note: Rejects ambiguous routes with multiple params and complex capturing groups

## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: SmartRouter tests using RegExpRouter then TrieRouter fallback
- Names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, runTest, describe, it, expect
- Simple note: All tests pass since SmartRouter delegates to faster routers

## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts

- Purpose: TrieRouter full coverage test suite
- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest, describe, it, expect, beforeEach, Node
- Simple note: Complete test coverage passing all common and specific router tests

## Cross-File Checklist

- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
